name: TagAssignment
description: TagAssignment schema from Censys Platform API

asset_id.description: The identifier of the tagged asset (host IP, certificate SHA-256 fingerprint, or web property domain/IP:port).

asset_type.description: The inferred type of the asset.

created_at.description: RFC3339 timestamp when the assignment was created.

created_by.description: The user ID of the user who created the assignment.

id.description: The unique ID of the assignment.

platform_ref.description: A direct URL to the asset in the Censys platform.
